whyQuant.label: Methodology
whyQuant.title: Why Quantitative Analysis Matters
whyQuant.desc: Stop guessing. Start measuring your performance with precision.
whyQuant.r1_desc: Analyze your results using real data from your trading history instead of intuition.
whyQuant.r2_title: Validate your strategy with professional metrics
whyQuant.r2_desc: Metrics like Expectancy, Profit Factor and Max Drawdown reveal whether your strategy has real statistical edge.
whyQuant.r3_desc: Identify which markets, sessions and conditions make your strategy perform best.
whyQuant.cta_note: Free · CSV, MT4 or MT5 Export

strategyScore.label: Evaluation
strategyScore.title: Your Strategy Score
strategyScore.desc: NodoQuant calculates a score from 0 to 100 based on profitability, consistency, risk control and sample size.

howItWorks.label: Process
howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.desc: Four simple steps to validate your trading system.
howItWorks.step1_desc: Export your trades from MT4, MT5 or your broker.
howItWorks.step2_desc: NodoQuant standardizes all trades into risk units for quantitative analysis.
howItWorks.step3_desc: Metrics such as Expectancy, Profit Factor and Drawdown are computed.
howItWorks.step4_desc: Visualize your performance, equity curve and Strategy Score.

faq.label: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.title: Common Questions
faq.a1: NodoQuant is a quantitative analysis platform for traders. Upload your historical trades and the platform evaluates whether your strategy has real statistical edge.
faq.a2: You can upload exports from: MetaTrader 4, MetaTrader 5, Binance, and Generic CSV files.
faq.q3: How many trades do I need?
faq.a3: For reliable results we recommend at least 100 trades. With fewer than 30 trades the analysis may not be statistically reliable.
faq.a4: Win Rate, Profit Factor, Expectancy (R), Max Drawdown, Strategy Score, and Performance by session, day and symbol.
faq.a5: Yes. Your trading data is never shared. Only aggregated metrics are visible if you decide to share your report.
faq.q6: Do I need to connect my broker?
faq.a6: No. You only need to upload your trading history as CSV or platform export.

finalCta.label: Start Now

footerNote.disclaimer: Backtesting results are historical and do not guarantee future performance. Always trade with capital you can afford to lose.
